playbook.intent: One indexed asset live each week (blog post, changelog, doc page): topic chosen against keyword + ICP, draft generated with AI then human-edited, on-page SEO complete, shared on 2 channels.
playbook.scope: One indexed asset live each week (blog post, changelog, doc page): topic chosen against keyword + ICP, draft generated with AI then human-edited, on-page SEO complete, shared on 2 channels.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pick the topic
stage.intent: Choose against keyword + ICP, not vibes.

tasks.task: Pick the single topic for this week

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when topic ties to a tracked keyword AND ICP pain.

stage.name: Outline + draft
stage.intent: AI-draft the bones, you sharpen the spine.

tasks.task: AI-generate the outline from research notes
Human-edit for voice and hard truths

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when human-edit pass is complete (no AI-default sentences).

stage.name: On-page SEO
stage.intent: Cover the boring but high-leverage details.

tasks.task: Run the on-page SEO checklist (title, meta, headings, schema)
Add internal links to the topical cluster
Optimise images and core web vitals

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when checklist is 100% green.

stage.name: Publish + index nudge
stage.intent: Get it live and indexed fast.

tasks.task: Submit URL to search indexing tools
Add to the sitemap and RSS

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when URL is live AND indexed.

stage.name: Distribute on 2 channels
stage.intent: Push out where the ICP lives.

tasks.task: Cross-post a short version to X / IH / LinkedIn
Reply in 2 relevant threads with the link

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when 2 channels have actually shipped a post.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-atomic-push --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-atomic-push --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-atomic-push --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
